title: CCX
description: CC: Tweaked addon adding misc stuff
body:
# CCX
CCX is my love letter to CC: Tweaked. In this mod I add several random things I've always wanted to see, or just random ideas i've thought of. This is also my first multiloader mod, however it is not my first mod.

## FAQ
Q: What cc version does this support?
A: it was built on cc 1.115.0, but it should work for any version above, unless major changes happen, then I will update.

Q: Can my idea be added?
A: most likely, just make a issue and put "[SUGGESTION]" in the title, and I'll most likely add it.

Q: No recipes?
A: I am working on recipes and they will be released soon

Q: why?
A: I've been wanting a mod to mess around with, ever since the failure of [Better Peripherals](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/better-peripherals), I've wanted a mod to do silly stuff with, that is what this mod is.

Q: Why is there submods? 
A: I like being organized. Is it optimial? hell no, but it sure helps me stay organized.

Q: wiki?
A: maybe one day, I don't really know when, but for 

## LICENSE / OTHER LEGAL ISSUES

The license is [here](https://github.com/minecraftbossdj/CCX/blob/multiloader/LICENSE)

I did use quite a lot of CC:Drone's code in this mod, only in the submod "CCX: Drones" but I do plan on straying from that code, it is just a "starter" you could say. CCDrones dev, if you do not like this, please message me or make a issue, I will gladly remove the code or other things if you need me to!

I did "sort of" recieve [permission](https://github.com/JSJBDEV/CCDrones/issues/3) but I wouldn't say *FULL* permission
